NPC ID: Note: Scripts only exist for NPCs that have a .js file in scripts/npc/. NPCs without a script fall back to WZ baked-in dialogue (or say nothing).
Note: To spawn an NPC use !pnpc [id]. To remove use !pnpcremove. Spawns saved in plife MySQL table.
Note: Some NPC IDs (e.g. 9999999 / 9030200) have no valid WZ model — spawning them will crash the map.
